original_image_tags: Page 18 of a typed table listing missile and space launches from March to May 1964. The page has three large black circular punch holes at the bottom.

elements.description: A typed table listing missile and space launch records from March to May 1964. Columns include LAUNCH SEQ, DATE, NICKNAME, OP #, FACILITY, VEHICLE TYPE, PROGRAM, CUM BY BOOSTER, COMMAND, and CUM BY COMMAND. The page contains rows 330 through 349, with 'PAGE 18' visible in the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains a typed table with no visual content like photographs or sketches, making the hallucination flag inapplicable.
